results.rendered_html: sārathi m. (fr. sa-ratha) a charioteer, driver of a car, coachman (forming a mixed caste, commonly called Sārthī, and supposed to have sprung from a Kṣatriya father and Brāhman mother),  RV.  &c. &c.
